title: Maine Department of Labor News & Events
description: Maine.gov publishes a 'What's New' RSS aggregator (tools/whatsnew/rss.php) that includes a working Labor feed, but maine.gov's own robots.txt disallows /tools/whatsnew/, so this source scrapes the Labor 'Latest News' list directly instead.
